## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between Redis and GrowthX for content strategy and execution.](https://fathom.video/share/UmFWigqDyrDqycaEiXMNUYx3tyz1mwMG?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Redis faces challenges with content refresh, AI-related positioning, and scaling technical content creation](https://fathom.video/share/UmFWigqDyrDqycaEiXMNUYx3tyz1mwMG?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end content strategy and execution services, with rapid results in AI/LLM visibility](https://fathom.video/share/UmFWigqDyrDqycaEiXMNUYx3tyz1mwMG?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [Redis team is interested in GrowthX's approach, particularly for refreshing existing content and improving AI-related messaging](https://fathom.video/share/UmFWigqDyrDqycaEiXMNUYx3tyz1mwMG?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)
  - [Next steps include involving key Redis stakeholders and reviewing a formal proposal from GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/UmFWigqDyrDqycaEiXMNUYx3tyz1mwMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)

## Topics

### Redis Content Landscape and Challenges

  - [Redis has \~6,000 total pages, \~1,300-1,400 excluding docs](https://fathom.video/share/UmFWigqDyrDqycaEiXMNUYx3tyz1mwMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1216.0)
  - [Majority of organic traffic comes from docs and technical content (tutorials, benchmarking)](https://fathom.video/share/UmFWigqDyrDqycaEiXMNUYx3tyz1mwMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1264.0)
  - [Current focus on creating new content rather than refreshing existing pages](https://fathom.video/share/UmFWigqDyrDqycaEiXMNUYx3tyz1mwMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
  - [Capacity constraints limit ability to reframe existing content (e.g., relating caching to AI stack)](https://fathom.video/share/UmFWigqDyrDqycaEiXMNUYx3tyz1mwMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1409.0)
  - [Brand team has strict review process for content voice and style](https://fathom.video/share/UmFWigqDyrDqycaEiXMNUYx3tyz1mwMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [Current SEO agency provides content briefs, but execution is challenging (60 unused briefs in queue)](https://fathom.video/share/UmFWigqDyrDqycaEiXMNUYx3tyz1mwMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)

### GrowthX Approach and Capabilities

  - [End-to-end service: strategy, execution, AI workflows, tooling, and CMS integration](https://fathom.video/share/UmFWigqDyrDqycaEiXMNUYx3tyz1mwMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [8-week initial strategy sprint with option to continue or terminate](https://fathom.video/share/UmFWigqDyrDqycaEiXMNUYx3tyz1mwMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1438.0)
  - [Rapid results: e.g., Engine.com seeing improvements by week 8](https://fathom.video/share/UmFWigqDyrDqycaEiXMNUYx3tyz1mwMG?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)
  - [Deep research and context-building process (2-3 weeks for calibration and artifact generation)](https://fathom.video/share/UmFWigqDyrDqycaEiXMNUYx3tyz1mwMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1426.0)
  - [Focus on efficient, high-quality content creation aligned with company context](https://fathom.video/share/UmFWigqDyrDqycaEiXMNUYx3tyz1mwMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1624.0)
  - [Ability to quickly improve AI/LLM visibility through strategic content updates](https://fathom.video/share/UmFWigqDyrDqycaEiXMNUYx3tyz1mwMG?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Refreshing and optimizing Redis' extensive content library](https://fathom.video/share/UmFWigqDyrDqycaEiXMNUYx3tyz1mwMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1392.0)
  - [Improving Redis' positioning in AI and vector database spaces](https://fathom.video/share/UmFWigqDyrDqycaEiXMNUYx3tyz1mwMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)
  - [Streamlining content creation and approval processes](https://fathom.video/share/UmFWigqDyrDqycaEiXMNUYx3tyz1mwMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)
  - [Replacing or complementing current SEO agency services](https://fathom.video/share/UmFWigqDyrDqycaEiXMNUYx3tyz1mwMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)

### GrowthX Case Studies

  - [Ramp: Consistent AI overview appearances, vendor catalog, per diem calculator](https://fathom.video/share/UmFWigqDyrDqycaEiXMNUYx3tyz1mwMG?tab=summary&timestamp=744.0)
  - [Augment Code: Immediate citations for new "Guides" section](https://fathom.video/share/UmFWigqDyrDqycaEiXMNUYx3tyz1mwMG?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Airbuy: 300 pages refreshed in 3 weeks, nearly 2x impressions](https://fathom.video/share/UmFWigqDyrDqycaEiXMNUYx3tyz1mwMG?tab=summary&timestamp=990.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send a formal proposal to Redis](https://fathom.video/share/UmFWigqDyrDqycaEiXMNUYx3tyz1mwMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
  - [Redis to involve Feng Lin (SEO budget owner) and brand team representatives in future discussions](https://fathom.video/share/UmFWigqDyrDqycaEiXMNUYx3tyz1mwMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1782.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide examples of content created for similar technical companies](https://fathom.video/share/UmFWigqDyrDqycaEiXMNUYx3tyz1mwMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
  - [Redis to review proposal and content examples](https://fathom.video/share/UmFWigqDyrDqycaEiXMNUYx3tyz1mwMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
  - [Schedule a deep-dive meeting with expanded Redis team](https://fathom.video/share/UmFWigqDyrDqycaEiXMNUYx3tyz1mwMG?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
